parameters.query: SELECT supplier_name, contact_name, country, products_supplied, lead_time_days FROM config_suppliers WHERE active = TRUE;

parameters.body: ={"model":"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001","max_tokens":2000,"system":"Assess supply chain risk for TAS (Traffic & Access Solutions) suppliers. Consider: single-source risk, geographic risk (China tariffs, shipping), lead time risk, financial stability indicators. Return JSON array: [{\"supplier_name\": \"...\", \"overall_risk\": \"low|medium|high|critical\", \"risk_factors\": {\"delivery_reliability\": N, \"financial_stability\": N, \"single_source\": bool, \"geopolitical_risk\": N}, \"lead_time_days\": N, \"mitigation_plan\": \"...\"}]","messages":[{"role":"user","content":"Suppliers: " + JSON.stringify($json)}]}

parameters.query: INSERT INTO supplier_risk (supplier_name, overall_risk, risk_factors, lead_time_days, mitigation_plan) VALUES ('{{$json.supplier_name}}', '{{$json.overall_risk}}', '{{JSON.stringify($json.risk_factors)}}'::jsonb, {{$json.lead_time_days || 'NULL'}}, '{{$json.mitigation_plan}}');

meta.description: Monthly 1st at 6 AM — assesses supply chain risk for all active suppliers. Stores in supplier_risk table.
